attributes.output.value: [{"id": "issue-1", "title": "Retry backoff resets on worker recycle"}, {"id": "issue-2", "title": "Alerting webhook drops events during high load"}, {"id": "issue-3", "title": "Add --dry-run flag to the migration CLI"}]
attributes.tool.name: list_issues

attributes.output.value:
Title: Retry backoff resets on worker recycle
The exponential backoff counter resets to zero whenever a worker process
recycles, so transient upstream 5xx storms cause a thundering-herd retry
instead of backing off. Expected: backoff state survives recycle.
attributes.tool.name: read_issue

attributes.output.value:
Title: Alerting webhook drops events during high load
We're seeing dropped alert events when the queue backs up past ~500 items —
the retry buffer doesn't flush before the worker recycles. Repro: load-test
at 1k events/min and watch the alert channel; roughly 3-5% never arrive.
attributes.tool.name: read_issue

attributes.output.value:
Title: Add --dry-run flag to the migration CLI
Feature request: a --dry-run that prints the planned schema changes without
applying them, so we can review migrations in CI before they hit staging.
attributes.tool.name: read_issue

attributes.input.value:
{"body": "Triage: Confirmed bug in retry/backoff logic. Root cause appears to be that backoff state is held in-process and not persisted/restored across worker recycle events, causing the counter to reset to zero. This can trigger thundering-herd retries during upstream 5xx storms.

Suggested fix: persist backoff state (e.g., last attempt count/timestamp) externally (shared cache/store) or pass it through the recycle handoff so new workers resume from the correct backoff level.

Severity: Medium-High (can amplify outages during upstream instability).
Labels suggested: bug, reliability, retry-logic.", "issue_id": "issue-1"}
attributes.tool.name: post_comment

attributes.input.value:
{"body": "Triage: Likely related/duplicate root cause to issue-1 (worker recycle not properly handling in-flight state) — here it's the retry buffer for alert events not flushing before recycle, causing ~3-5% event loss under load (>500 queued items, 1k events/min).

Suggested fix: ensure graceful shutdown drains/flushes the retry buffer before a worker recycles, and/or add a persistent queue (rather than in-memory buffer) so events survive recycle. Add a load test asserting zero drop rate at target throughput as a regression check.

Severity: High (data loss for alerting is a reliability/observability risk).
Labels suggested: bug, data-loss, high-load, needs-load-test.", "issue_id": "issue-2"}
attributes.tool.name: post_comment

attributes.input.value:
{"body": "Triage: Reasonable feature request. A --dry-run flag for the migration CLI that prints planned schema changes without applying them would help CI review workflows and reduce risk of unreviewed migrations hitting staging.

Suggested approach: reuse the existing migration planning step, but skip the execution/apply phase, and output a diff/plan summary (SQL statements or change list). Consider also supporting a machine-readable output (JSON) for CI tooling.

Severity: Low (enhancement, not a bug). Good first issue candidate.
Labels suggested: enhancement, cli, good-first-issue.", "issue_id": "issue-3"}
attributes.tool.name: post_comment

attributes.input.value: Review the open issues in this repository and post a brief triage summary as a comment on each issue.
